parameters.text:
=You are a developer assistant. Summarize this GitHub activity for the week of {{ $('Code in JavaScript').item.json.weekOf }} in a clean, human-readable email digest.

Format the output like this:
- Start with a friendly intro line
- Group activity by repository
- Under each repo list commits with their messages
- End with a short motivational line for the developer

Keep it concise and friendly. Here is the activity:

{{ $('Code in JavaScript').item.json.activity }}

parameters.content:
# 🤖 GitHub Weekly Digest

Automatically fetches your GitHub activity every week,
summarizes it with Gemini AI, and sends it to your email.

Author: Slim Khardani
GitHub: github.com/slimkhardani

## ⚙️ Setup Required

1. GitHub Personal Access Token
   → github.com/settings/tokens
   → Scopes: repo, read:user

2. Gemini API Key
   → aistudio.google.com
   → Free tier is enough

3. Gmail OAuth2
   → Connect your Google account
   → Allow n8n permissions

## 🔄 Workflow Steps

1. SCHEDULE TRIGGER
   Runs every Monday at 9:00 AM or any time by your choice.

2. GITHUB API
   Fetches your last 30 events
   (commits, issues, PRs)

3. CODE NODE
   Groups events by repository
   Formats data for AI

4. GEMINI AI
   Summarizes activity into
   a human-readable digest

5. GMAIL
   Sends the digest to your inbox

## ✏️ Customize This Workflow

- Change schedule: Edit the trigger node
- Change recipient: Edit the Gmail node "To" field
- Change AI tone: Edit the prompt in Basic LLM Chain
- Add more repos: The GitHub API fetches all your repos automatically
